title: Coal gasification
abstract: A method of producing syngas wherein a carbonaceous feedstock is exposed to a plasma arc generated by a DC supply in a dry-steam environment.
claims: Claims 1. A method of producing syngas wherein a carbonaceous feedstock is exposed to a plasma arc generated by a DC supply in a dry-steam environment. 2. A method according to claim 1 wherein the plasma arc is produced in a reactor and the carbonaceous feedstock is introduced via a plasma arc plume into a lower region of the reactor. 3. A method according to claim 1 wherein the plasma arc is produced in a reactor and the carbonaceous feedstock is introduced into an upper region of the reactor. 4. A method according to claim 2 or 3 wherein the carbonaceous feedstock is fed together with a dry steam feed into the reactor or it is fed separately, from a dry steam feed, into the reactor. 5. A method according to any one of claims 1 to 4 wherein the plasma arc is generated by the use of a DC open arc furnace and the plasma arc is at least one of the following: an open arc within a reactor of the furnace, and an immersed arc produced by immersion of an electrode of the furnace in slag in a bottom region of the reactor. 6. An apparatus for producing syngas from a carbonaceous feedstock material, which apparatus comprises a DC arc gasifier which processes the feedstock material and which includes a lower vessel within which a plasma arc is established and an upper vessel which is operated as an entrained flow gasifier. 7. An apparatus according to claim 6 wherein the plasma is established as at least one of the following: as an open arc, and as an immersed arc in a molten slag layer in a lower region of the lower vessel. 8. An apparatus according to claim 6 or 7 which includes at least one hollow electrode and the feedstock material is fed to the lower vessel through the hollow electrode. 9. An apparatus according to claim 6 or 7 wherein the feedstock material is fed into the entrained flow gasifier which, in turn, feeds into the lower vessel. 10. An apparatus according to any one of claims 6 to 9 wherein the lower vessel includes a slag containment structure with a slag tapping facility and at least one electrode which establishes a DC plasma arc in the lower vessel. 1 1. An apparatus according to any one of claims 6 to 10 wherein pulverized coal, which is the carbonaceous feedstock material, is applied to the DC arc gasifier in a slurry formed from the pulverized coal and dry steam.
